title: What is Azure IoT Edge
description: Learn how Azure IoT Edge enables you to deploy, run, and monitor containerized Linux applications at the edge for better business insights and offline decision-making.
summary: Applies to:IoT Edge 1.5 Important IoT Edge 1.5 LTS is thesupported release. IoT Edge 1.4 LTS reached end of life on November 12, 2024. If you're using an earlier release, seeUpdate IoT Edge. Analytics drives business value in IoT solutions, but not all analytics need to be in the cloud.
